description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsWhite brassiere, has lace detail on the back strap and in between the cups, adjustable straps, adjustable double hook and eye clasp at the back, high coverage and spacer moulded style cups, comfortably underwired which offers a smooth rounded contour and broad bottom bands and straps which allows a firm holdMaterial and Care87% polyester, 12% nylon and 1% elastaneHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
